oneOf.description: Configuration for a state store based on CDF Raw
oneOf.title: Raw

type.description: Type of state store, must be 'raw' for a CDF Raw based state store

database.description: Name of the database to use for the state store

table.description: Name of the table to use for the state store

upload-interval.description: Interval for uploading state store data to CDF Raw, on the form 12s, 15m, 1h, etc.

oneOf.description: Configuration for a state store based on a local JSON file
oneOf.title: Local

type.description: Type of state store, must be 'local' for a local JSON file based state store

path.description: File path to the JSON file to use for the state store

save-interval.description: Interval for saving state store data to the local JSON file, on the form 12s, 15m, 1h, etc.
